title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited:
S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
